testsuite.name: MorePhiTests.exe

testcase.name: MorePhi test harness is available
PhysicsEngine::updateElastic: position converges toward target
PhysicsEngine::updateElastic: starts from rest with zero velocity
PhysicsEngine::updateElastic: slow preset converges slower than medium
PhysicsEngine::updateElastic: is noexcept
PhysicsEngine::updateElastic: sample-rate independent (H-2)
PhysicsEngine::perlin: output is bounded within [-1.5, 1.5] for varied inputs
PhysicsEngine::perlin: identical inputs produce identical output
PhysicsEngine::perlin: nearby inputs produce nearby outputs (smooth)
PhysicsEngine::perlin: is noexcept
PhysicsEngine::updateDrift: Free mode produces non-zero output for non-zero time
PhysicsEngine::updateDrift: Locked mode stays near anchor
PhysicsEngine::updateDrift: is noexcept
GeneticEngine::breed: crossoverRatio=0 produces result approx parentA
GeneticEngine::breed: crossoverRatio=1 produces result approx parentB
GeneticEngine::breed: output is clamped to [0, 1]
GeneticEngine::smartRandomize: only modifies learned parameters
GeneticEngine::smartRandomize: amount=0 makes no changes
GeneticEngine::smartRandomize: empty learned set makes no changes
GeneticEngine::breed: SanityMode protects danger params
GeneticEngine::smartRandomize: SanityMode protects danger params
GeneticEngine::breed: SanityMode disabled has no effect
BrickwallLimiter: honors dBTP ceiling against inter-sample peaks (B-1)
ModulationMatrix: concurrent mutation + apply stays consistent (MODULATION-1)
Sidechain: silent buffer does not trigger
Sidechain: loud buffer fires trigger exactly once
Sidechain: sustained loud does not re-trigger
Sidechain: loud-silent-loud triggers on second rising edge
Sidechain: round-robin cycles through 12 slots
Sidechain: disabled does not fire triggers
Sidechain: threshold accessor round-trips
OversamplingWrapper: x1 factor reports zero latency
OversamplingWrapper: x2 factor reports positive latency
OversamplingWrapper: x4 FIR factor latency is greater than x2
OversamplingWrapper: IIR mode has lower or equal latency than FIR at same factor
OversamplingWrapper: reset() does not change latency
OversamplingWrapper: reprepare with different block size is safe
OversamplingWrapper: x1 upsample returns a block of the same size
OversamplingWrapper: x4 upsample block has 4x the samples
OversamplingWrapper: x2 and x4 produce finite downsampled output
BrickwallLimiter reports true peak separately from gain reduction
LUFSMeter gates digital silence
TruePeakEstimator reports silence explicitly
LUFSMeter reports finite output for a known sine fixture
LUFSMeter throttled recompute still yields valid integrated/LRA on long sessions (LUFS-7)
TruePeakEstimator reports finite bounded output for a known sine fixture
AutoMasteringEngine publishes live analyzer snapshots
HarmonicExciter oversampled saturation stays bounded when enabled (ENHANCERS-1)
AutoMasteringEngine applies only validated neural mastering plans
Processor processBlock feeds local mastering analysis tap
OversamplingWrapper: CPU overhead factor increases with factor
MorphProcessor: prepares successfully at all supported sample rates
OversamplingWrapper: prepares correctly at all supported sample rates
MorphProcessor: produces consistent output across varying block sizes
Latency: oversampling latency increases monotonically with factor
Latency: x1 bypass introduces exactly 0 samples of latency
Smoothing: converges to target without DC bias when input is zero
Audio quality: upsample+downsample SNR > 80 dB for 1 kHz sine at x4 FIR
Audio quality: x1 bypass has perfect SNR (exact pass-through)
InterpolationEngine: interpolateBatch_SIMD matches scalar for all boundary t values
InterpolationEngine: interpolateBatch_SIMD handles non-multiple-of-8 sizes correctly
MorphProcessor: with no occupied slots, output remains unchanged
Denormal guard: ScopedNoDenormals compiles and is available
LatencyManager: zero on construction
LatencyManager: total = sum of all components
LatencyManager: negative inputs are clamped to zero
LatencyManager: updating one component recalculates total
LatencyManager: FFT window latency matches fftSize/2 formula
LatencyManager: mode switch to bypass resets oversampling latency to 0
Audio quality: no aliasing above Nyquist after x4 oversampling
InterpolationEngine: 1D compute output is monotonic between snapshots
InterpolationEngine: 1D compute returns exact snapshot values at endpoints
Snapshot Suite: captures 12 slots, recalls by checksum, morphs adjacent slots, and handles empties
MorphProcessor: higher smoothing rate converges more slowly
MorphProcessor: smoothing rate 0.0 means instant convergence
SemanticPluginProfile classifies EQ and limiter controls
SemanticPluginProfile semantic IDs ignore display values
SemanticPluginProfile disambiguates duplicate semantic IDs
ParameterBridge getParameterDescriptor uses test descriptors
ParameterBridge display value samples test descriptors with clamping
MCP tool list exposes semantic profile tools
MCP plugin profile audit includes semantic controls
MCP safe action rejects locked controls
MCP safe normalized action queues safe control and returns snapshot
MCP safe action rejects when parameter edits are pending
MCP restores safe action snapshot through parameter queue
MCP safe action snapshot restore rejects changed parameter layout
ParameterClassifier token estimation/optimization paths do not deadlock
TokenOptimizer compression bounds and rate-limit bookkeeping are safe
MCP morph compatibility returns computed non-placeholder output
Processor external edit hold persists until morph position moves
Processor snapshot recall marker clears external edit holds
Processor parameter command queue reports full
MCP set_parameter reports queue_full when resolved edit cannot be queued
MCP set_parameters_batch reports partial queue_full accounting
MCP optimized set reports queue_full when resolved edit cannot be queued
MCP EQ preview and reject route through assistant preview state
MCP EQ preview reports command queue saturation
MCP optimized set reports when no parameter edits were queued
MCP set_parameter reports rejected edits when no parameter resolves
MCP set_parameters_batch reports all-rejected batches honestly
MCP set_morph_position survives the following APVTS processBlock sync
MCP tool list includes diagnose_parameter_pipeline
diagnose_parameter_pipeline reports blocked stages when no plugin loaded
diagnose_parameter_pipeline reports healthy stages with test descriptors
diagnose_parameter_pipeline reports queue health under load
diagnose_parameter_pipeline param_index reports per-parameter state
diagnose_parameter_pipeline param_index reports nonexistent for out-of-range
diagnose_parameter_pipeline reports live edit holds when active
MCP set_parameter flush reports pluginUnavailable when no hosted plugin
VAE stub loadModel is non-crashing and reports stub backend
LLM provider definitions are exactly the approved providers
Known providers have fixed base URLs and OpenAI Compatible is editable
Default LLM settings have no active provider
Provider activation requires a successful validation status
Status labels match toolbar and modal vocabulary
LLM settings store round-trips provider credentials, models, and status
LLM settings store omits custom base URLs for fixed providers
Unvalidated LLM provider settings do not replace the active provider
Missing LLM settings config loads defaults and clears the active provider
Malformed LLM settings config reports a read error and resets defaults
Unknown LLM active provider keys are ignored during load
Validator builds provider-specific model fetch requests
Validator rejects missing API key and invalid compatible base URL
Validator parses OpenAI-style and Anthropic-style model lists
Validator reports auth failure and malformed model responses
Validator parses test prompt responses and requires OK
LLM chat client exposes API-safe runtime MCP tool names with full tool access
LLM chat client exposes hosted and More-Phi edit tools to Anthropic
LLM chat client system prompt encodes underscore naming and confirmation list
AI chat panel handles MCP tool inventory questions locally
AI assistant plans local morph language as a WorkflowRun DAG
AI assistant executes local natural language through workflow transactions
MCP memory.update_outcome_feedback updates automatic workflow outcome
AI assistant records feedback for the last local workflow outcome
AI assistant records corrective feedback for an overdone local workflow
AI chat panel formats workflow timeline previews and feedback
AI chat panel formats pending approval queue entries
AI assistant reports when there is no local workflow to receive feedback
AI chat panel detects local workflow prompts before cloud chat
AI chat panel formats raw WinHTTP timeout errors
parseOpenAIResponse extracts NVIDIA inline tool-call tokens
parseOpenAIResponse extracts multiple NVIDIA inline tool calls
parseOpenAIResponse prefers structured tool_calls over inline tokens
Tool name resolution is consistent across repeated calls (cached map)
Chat-filtered tool surface is smaller than full surface (OpenAI)
Chat-filtered tool surface is smaller than full surface (Anthropic)
Conversation history trimming preserves system message and caps size
Conversation history trimming is a no-op for small histories
LLM settings dialog exposes exactly the approved provider names
LLM settings dialog only allows OpenAI Compatible base URL edits
OfflineBatchRenderer keeps FabFilter trap params out of randomized renders
AudioBufferPool provides reusable buffers
SIMD audio operations are faster than scalar
CPU capability detection
Scalar addition operations
Vector multiplication operations
Vector addition operations
Peak detection operations
RMS calculation operations
RMS calculation with sine wave
Edge cases/Empty array
Edge cases/Single sample
Edge cases/Odd number of samples
PerformanceProfiler measures execution time
Processor: construction and destruction do not crash
Processor: processBlock with live audio preserves buffer integrity
Processor: state save/restore round-trip preserves APVTS values
Processor: all new APVTS parameters exist
Processor: supports stereo in/out layout
MCP initialize rejects missing bearer token
MCP initialize succeeds with instance auth token
MCP tools/list and tools/call wrappers work with legacy handlers
MCP tools/call can edit More-Phi runtime parameters
MCP mastering render job can be started, polled, and selected
testcase.system-err: [WARNING] No plugin host available — all renders will be dry passthrough! Check that the --plugin path points to a valid .vst3 file.

testcase.name: MCP set/get morph state uses authenticated flow and public accessors
MCP rate limit is enforced through token optimizer bookkeeping
DatasetGeneratorV2: initialization succeeds
DatasetGeneratorV2: parameter sampling works
DatasetGeneratorV3: configuration accepted
DatasetGeneratorV3: can use V2 parameter sets
FeatureExtractor: full extraction pipeline
User manual feature surface exposes implementation-backed automation parameters
User guide feature surface exposes implementation-backed workflow controls
User manual feature surface records documented automation ID drift
User manual feature surface exposes Engine tab APVTS parameters
User manual feature surface includes the documented five editor tabs
User manual feature surface can construct and resize the editor headlessly
User manual feature surface mode selector updates APVTS and processor state
User manual feature surface mode selector syncs from automation
AI chat tab uses expanded screen real estate
Chat display scrolls with keyboard and wheel input
Snap fader auto-refresh detects assistant-driven morph changes
VST3 parameter automation exposes documented parameters to the host
VST3 parameter automation updates representative APVTS values
VST3 parameter automation syncs APVTS values into runtime state
VST3 parameter automation applies output gain during processing
VST3 parameter automation bypass remains transparent with no hosted plugin
VST3 smart randomize parameter is exposed as automatable but has no processor trigger path
VST3 MIDI handling maps documented C3-B3 notes to snapshot slots
VST3 MIDI handling consumes trigger note-offs and passes out-of-range notes
VST3 MIDI handling maps CC1 to morph fader value
VST3 MIDI handling updates processor fader path from CC1
VST3 sidechain bus and APVTS state are available to the processor
VST3 sidechain trigger opens on rising threshold edge and advances slots
VST3 audio signal accuracy keeps processed samples finite
VST3 audio signal accuracy preserves silence with no hosted plugin
VST3 audio signal accuracy applies output gain at 0 dB and nonzero gains
VST3 audio signal accuracy bypass is bit-transparent without hosted plugin
VST3 audio signal accuracy is deterministic under neutral settings
VST3 audio signal accuracy preserves stereo consistency for identical input
VST3 audio signal accuracy preserves invalid neural plan state
VST3 neural mastering plan transitions keep signal bounded and mono-compatible
LFO waveform generation: sine outputs [-1, 1] range
LFO waveform generation: triangle is symmetric
LFO waveform generation: triangle is symmetric/positive peak roughly mirrors negative peak
LFO waveform generation: saw ramps from -1 to 1
LFO waveform generation: saw ramps from -1 to 1/saw output is monotonically increasing within a cycle
LFO waveform generation: square is binary plus-or-minus 1
LFO waveform generation: sample-and-hold latches on phase wrap
LFO waveform generation: rate of 1 Hz completes cycle in 1 second
LFO waveform generation: tempo sync calculates correct rate from BPM
EnvelopeFollower tracking: silent input produces zero output
EnvelopeFollower tracking: loud input produces high output
EnvelopeFollower tracking: attack time controls rise speed
EnvelopeFollower tracking: release time controls decay speed
EnvelopeFollower tracking: sensitivity scales output
StepSequencer sequencing: forward direction cycles through steps
StepSequencer sequencing: backward direction reverses
StepSequencer sequencing: ping-pong reverses at boundaries
StepSequencer sequencing: step count limits range
StepSequencer sequencing: smoothing interpolates between steps
ModulationMatrix routing: empty matrix passes output unchanged
ModulationMatrix routing: single route modulates target param
ModulationMatrix routing: depth controls modulation amount
ModulationMatrix routing: negative depth inverts modulation
ModulationMatrix routing: disabled route has no effect
ModulationMatrix routing: remove route stops modulation
ModulationMatrix routing: max 128 routes enforced
ModulationMatrix routing: out-of-range dest param ignored safely
ModulationEngine integration: processBlock with no routes is identity
ModulationEngine integration: LFO routed to param oscillates output
ModulationEngine integration: macro knob scales modulation
ModulationEngine integration: MIDI velocity modulates target
ModulationEngine integration: serialization round-trip preserves routes
ModulationState: MAX_ROUTES is 128
ModulationState: default construction has zero active routes
ModRoute: default construction is unassigned and disabled
ModSourceId: NUM_SOURCES equals number of enum members
ModulationMatrix: clearAllRoutes resets to zero routes
ModulationMatrix: output is always clamped to [0, 1]
TransientDetector: steady signal returns unmodified alpha
TransientDetector: transient onset snaps alpha toward hard switch
TransientDetector: release decays transient mix back to zero
TransientDetector: reset clears state
SpectralMorphEngine lifecycle: prepare allocates all buffers
SpectralMorphEngine lifecycle: reset clears state without deallocation
SpectralMorphEngine lifecycle: latency equals fftSize/2 + hopSize
SpectralMorphEngine lifecycle: inactive engine passes audio unchanged
SpectralMorphEngine processing: alpha=0 outputs source A
SpectralMorphEngine processing: alpha=1 outputs source B
SpectralMorphEngine processing: alpha=0.5 interpolates magnitudes
SpectralMorphEngine processing: output energy is bounded (no blowup)
SpectralMorphEngine processing: DC offset remains near zero
FormantMorphEngine: inactive engine passes audio unchanged
FormantMorphEngine: formant preservation maintains spectral envelope
FormantMorphEngine: preservation amount scales effect
FormantMorphEngine: preservation amount is clamped to [0, 1]
SpectralMorphEngine: setActive/isActive round-trips
SpectralMorphEngine: multiple latency configurations are consistent
GrainPool management: all grains initially inactive
GrainPool management: activate returns valid index
GrainPool management: pool returns -1 when exhausted (128 grains)
GrainPool management: deactivate frees slot for reuse
GrainPool management: forEachActive visits only active grains
GrainPool management: deactivate out-of-range index is safe
GrainPool management: envelope is Hann-shaped at boundaries
GrainPool management: envelope is Hann-shaped at boundaries/Hann window is symmetric about 0.5
GrainPool management: envelope is Hann-shaped at boundaries/Hann window is non-negative everywhere
GrainPool management: reset clears all active grains
GranularMorphEngine processing: inactive engine passes audio unchanged
GranularMorphEngine processing: alpha=0 produces only source A grains
GranularMorphEngine processing: alpha=1 produces only source B grains
GranularMorphEngine processing: grain density controls output activity
GranularMorphEngine processing: grain size affects temporal resolution
GranularMorphEngine processing: output stays within reasonable amplitude bounds
HybridBlend: weight (1,0,0) outputs parameter buffer only
HybridBlend: weight (0,1,0) outputs spectral buffer only
HybridBlend: weight (0,0,1) outputs granular buffer only
HybridBlend: equal weights produces weighted average
HybridBlend: blendTwo with alpha=0 outputs bufA
HybridBlend: blendTwo with alpha=1 outputs bufB
HybridBlend: blendTwo with alpha=0.5 produces linear midpoint
HybridBlend: equal-power: sqrt weighting at crossfade midpoint
HybridBlend: equal-power preserves total energy at crossfade midpoint
HybridBlend: equal-power alpha=0 is all bufA, alpha=1 is all bufB
HybridBlend: blendTwo is monotonic between alpha=0 and alpha=1
GrainPool: isActive returns false for out-of-range indices
PresetEntry validation: empty id is invalid
PresetEntry validation: empty name is invalid
PresetEntry validation: valid entry passes validation
PresetEntry validation: both id and name required
PresetSerializerV2 round-trip: serialize then deserialize preserves all fields
PresetSerializerV2 round-trip: tags are preserved
PresetSerializerV2 round-trip: hosted plugin info is preserved
PresetSerializerV2 round-trip: invalid JSON returns false
PresetSerializerV2 round-trip: missing required fields returns false
PresetSerializerV2 round-trip: schema version is 2.0
PresetSerializerV2 round-trip: wrong schema version fails deserialization
PresetLibrary CRUD: save creates entry in library
PresetLibrary CRUD: load retrieves saved preset
PresetLibrary CRUD: update modifies existing preset
PresetLibrary CRUD: remove deletes preset from library
PresetLibrary CRUD: exists returns true for saved preset
PresetLibrary CRUD: exists returns false for unknown id
PresetLibrary CRUD: getPresetCount tracks library size
PresetLibrary CRUD: save invalid entry fails
PresetLibrary CRUD: update non-existent preset fails
PresetLibrary search: text query matches name
PresetLibrary search: text query matches author
PresetLibrary search: text query is case-insensitive
PresetLibrary search: tag filter requires all specified tags
PresetLibrary search: plugin filter restricts results
PresetLibrary search: min rating filters low-rated presets
PresetLibrary search: sort by name alphabetizes results
PresetLibrary search: sort by date newest puts recent first
PresetLibrary search: maxResults limits output
PresetLibrary search: empty query returns all presets
PresetLibrary import/export: export creates valid JSON file
PresetLibrary import/export: import reads exported file
PresetLibrary import/export: import from directory finds all JSON files
PresetLibrary import/export: import from non-existent directory returns 0
UUID generation: generated UUIDs are unique
UUID generation: UUID format is valid v4
UUID generation: UUID has correct character count
UUID generation: UUID has dashes at correct positions
V2 audio domain bypass: audioDomainEnabled=false behaves like V1
V2 audio domain bypass: audioDomainEnabled=false behaves like V1/no additional latency in bypass mode
V2 audio domain bypass: no Plugin B loaded skips audio-domain path
V2 audio domain bypass: audioDomainEnabled=true with Plugin B adds spectral latency
V2 modulation in pipeline: modulation engine runs after morph processor
V2 modulation in pipeline: modulation output is clamped to [0,1]
V2 modulation in pipeline: modulation with zero sources has no effect
V2 modulation in pipeline: multiple routes accumulate correctly
V2 latency reporting: total latency sums all components
V2 latency reporting: oversampling x1 adds zero latency
V2 latency reporting: spectral engine latency is fftSize/2 + hopSize
V2 latency reporting: latency increases with oversampling factor
V2 latency reporting: LatencyManager recomputes on component update
V2 latency reporting: negative latency values are clamped to zero
V2 pipeline: MorphProcessor output is valid input for modulation
V2 pipeline: modulation does not propagate changes between parameter slots
V2 pipeline: process() is noexcept at V1 layer
V2 pipeline: V2 config with all features disabled is equivalent to V1
PluginHostManager exclusive state guard clears when no plugin is loaded
MIDI routing audit placeholder compiles
Concurrency audit placeholder compiles
SnapshotBank state chunks are copied, persisted, and cleared with their slot
Stress edge-case audit placeholder compiles
End-to-end signal path audit placeholder compiles
MCP server audit placeholder compiles
MCP tools/list exposes standard and mastering workflow tools
MCP More-Phi runtime parameter tools list, read, and write APVTS controls
MCP More-Phi runtime batch tool reports partial rejection
MCP control-plane namespaces expose context, permissions, memory, and transaction history
MCP workflow.submit executes steps through permissioned transactions
MCP PermissionPolicy blocks high-impact hosted plugin load with approval request
MCP permission approval decisions are auditable
MCP approval requests include predicted diffs for reversible controls
VST3 MCP handler exposes IPC assistant status and write gate
MCP Ozone audit discovers and applies hosted parameter map
MCP semantic map describes hosted parameters as safe LLM controls
MCP semantic map alias validates current plugin id and empty parameter state
MCP analysis tools expose spectrum and stereo field snapshots
MCP analysis summary reports deterministic methodology and model status
MCP capture window reports no samples before analysis tap has data
MCP capture window returns accumulated rolling meter statistics
MCP dry-run mastering candidates can be selected and applied
Rendered mastering candidate score is based on render sanity metrics
TrackAssistantStore persists local track records
PermissionKernel enforces autonomy risk boundaries
PermissionKernel persists autonomy and approval queue state
ActionLedger records auditable AutomationTransaction entries
WorkflowOrchestrator creates and completes durable WorkflowRun scaffolds
WorkflowOrchestrator persists submitted DAGs and executes dependencies
WorkflowOrchestrator rejects invalid workflow graphs
WorkflowOrchestrator records Diagnose-Revise-Retry attempts
IntegrationEventBus preserves ordering within bounded history
MemoryStore supports CRUD and scoped lexical retrieval
MemoryStore updates ActionOutcome feedback without duplicating records
MemoryStore returns ActionOutcome evidence as advisory intent context
OzoneParameterMap::normalizeGain boundary values/Min gain maps to 0.0
OzoneParameterMap::normalizeGain boundary values/Max gain maps to 1.0
OzoneParameterMap::normalizeGain boundary values/Zero gain maps to 0.5
OzoneParameterMap::normalizeGain boundary values/Custom range: -6 to +6 dB, midpoint = 0.5
OzoneParameterMap::normalizeGain boundary values/Result is clamped to [0, 1] for out-of-range input
OzoneParameterMap::normalizeFreq boundary values/20 Hz (min) maps to 0.0
OzoneParameterMap::normalizeFreq boundary values/20 000 Hz (max) maps to 1.0
OzoneParameterMap::normalizeFreq boundary values/Midpoint on log scale is ~632 Hz (geometric mean of 20–20k)
OzoneParameterMap::normalizeThreshold boundary values/-60 dBFS maps to 0.0
OzoneParameterMap::normalizeThreshold boundary values/0 dBFS maps to 1.0
OzoneParameterMap::normalizeThreshold boundary values/-30 dBFS maps to 0.5
OzoneParameterMap::isOzone11 name detection/Exact match — full product name
OzoneParameterMap::isOzone11 name detection/Partial match — standard edition
OzoneParameterMap::isOzone11 name detection/Case-insensitive match
OzoneParameterMap::isOzone11 name detection/Neutron 5 does NOT match
OzoneParameterMap::isOzone11 name detection/Ozone 10 does NOT match
OzoneParameterMap::isOzone11 name detection/Empty string does NOT match
OzoneParameterMap all-minus-one map is a safe no-op
ChainPlanExecutor calls registered OzonePlanApplicator on executePlan
ChainPlanExecutor calls registered OzonePlanApplicator on executePlan/Plan is valid
ChainPlanExecutor calls registered OzonePlanApplicator on executePlan/Applicator was called exactly once
ChainPlanExecutor calls registered OzonePlanApplicator on executePlan/Applicator received the same plan
ChainPlanExecutor calls registered OzonePlanApplicator on executePlan/Clearing the applicator stops calls
NeuralMasteringSafety rejects malformed candidates/schema mismatch is rejected
NeuralMasteringSafety rejects malformed candidates/NaN target is rejected
NeuralMasteringSafety rejects malformed candidates/Inf delta is rejected
NeuralMasteringSafety rejects malformed candidates/out-of-range targets are rejected
NeuralMasteringSafety rejects malformed candidates/empty editable masks are illegal
NeuralMasteringSafety handles confidence and runtime gating/low confidence falls back to review-only
NeuralMasteringSafety handles confidence and runtime gating/abstain falls back to deterministic baseline
NeuralMasteringSafety handles confidence and runtime gating/review-only candidates are not accepted for application
NeuralMasteringSafety handles confidence and runtime gating/stale plans hold the last safe plan
NeuralMasteringSafety handles confidence and runtime gating/unsupported layouts are rejected without changing last-safe state
NeuralMasteringSafety handles confidence and runtime gating/audio callback runtime is prohibited
NeuralMasteringSafety projects bounded plans and selects fallback modes/max delta projection preserves an accepted bounded plan
NeuralMasteringSafety projects bounded plans and selects fallback modes/high-risk controls are blocked by mask policy
NeuralMasteringSafety projects bounded plans and selects fallback modes/last safe hold preserves the prior plan when available
NeuralMasteringSafety projects bounded plans and selects fallback modes/deterministic baseline fallback is observable
NeuralMasteringSafety projects bounded plans and selects fallback modes/transparent bypass fallback is observable
NeuralMasteringSafety projects bounded plans and selects fallback modes/explicit reject fallback does not update last-safe state
NeuralMasteringSafety projects bounded plans and selects fallback modes/valid plans update last-safe state
NeuralMasteringDatasetSchema validates provenance license split and reference quality/complete approved dataset item is valid
NeuralMasteringDatasetSchema validates provenance license split and reference quality/missing provenance is rejected
NeuralMasteringDatasetSchema validates provenance license split and reference quality/unresolved license is rejected
NeuralMasteringDatasetSchema validates provenance license split and reference quality/unreviewed reference quality is rejected
NeuralMasteringDatasetSchema validates provenance license split and reference quality/unsupported material is rejected
NeuralMasteringDatasetSchema enforces split isolation
NeuralMasteringDatasetSchema validates disabled model-card metadata fixtures/disabled metadata-only PoC can be structurally valid without enabling runtime inference
NeuralMasteringDatasetSchema validates disabled model-card metadata fixtures/audio callback inference is rejected in metadata
NeuralMasteringDatasetSchema validates disabled model-card metadata fixtures/missing supported layout is rejected
NeuralMasteringController uses deterministic no-model baseline
NeuralMasteringController applies validated plans outside the audio callback
MorePhiProcessor processBlock does not invoke neural mastering planner or model
MeterWindowAccumulator reports empty windows explicitly
MeterWindowAccumulator computes rolling percentile statistics
RealtimeSpectrumAnalyzer publishes an empty snapshot after reset
RealtimeSpectrumAnalyzer estimates a sine wave centroid
RealtimeSpectrumAnalyzer downmixes stereo before analysis
StereoFieldAnalyzer publishes an empty snapshot after reset
StereoFieldAnalyzer reports positive left-right correlation
StereoFieldAnalyzer reports mono content as zero width
StereoFieldAnalyzer preserves side polarity in correlation
StereoFieldAnalyzer exposes side-heavy content through M/S ratio
License key parser normalizes and verifies checksum
License key parser rejects checksum mismatch
License key parser accepts purchasing backend MPHI keys
License verifier validates trusted development certificate
License verifier rejects machine mismatch
HTTP activation client reports missing configuration without network

testsuite.system-err: [WARNING] No plugin host available — all renders will be dry passthrough! Check that the --plugin path points to a valid .vst3 file.
